subscriptions.upgradeDesc: Slovor Pro accounts give you professional tools to stand out from the crowd. With boosted visibility and priority support, your listings sell on average 3x faster than basic accounts.
subscriptions.paymentSafetyDesc: All payments are handled securely via Slovor Pay. No credit card details are stored on our servers. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your settings.
